```python
expected = "11"
observed = counts.get(expected, 0)

assert observed > 0.9 * shots, f"Expected strong concentration on {expected}, got counts={counts}"
assert sum(v for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected) < 0.1 * shots, f"Unexpected leakage outside {expected}: counts={counts}"
```

```python
expected = "11"
observed = counts.get(expected, 0)
total = sum(counts.values())

assert total == shots, f"Total counts {total} do not match shots {shots}"
assert observed == shots, f"Expected all measurements to be '{expected}' for this balanced Deutsch-Jozsa oracle, got counts={counts}"
assert set(counts.keys()) == {expected}, f"Unexpected measurement outcomes present: {counts}"
```

```python
expected = "11"
observed = counts.get(expected, 0)

assert observed > 0, f"Expected outcome {expected} not found in counts: {counts}"
assert observed >= 0.9 * shots, f"Deutsch-Jozsa signature should dominate for balanced oracle x0 XOR x1; got {observed}/{shots} for {expected}"
assert sum(v for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected) <= 0.1 * shots, f"Too much probability mass outside {expected}: {counts}"
```

```python
expected = "11"
observed = counts.get(expected, 0)

assert observed > 0, f"Expected outcome {expected} not present in counts: {counts}"
assert observed >= 0.9 * shots, f"Deutsch-Jozsa should concentrate on {expected}; got {observed}/{shots} counts with counts={counts}"

unexpected = sum(v for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected)
assert unexpected <= 0.1 * shots, f"Too much probability mass on unexpected outcomes: {counts}"
```

```python
expected = "11"
observed = counts.get(expected, 0)
assert observed > 0, f"Expected outcome {expected} missing from counts: {counts}"

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, f"Counts total {total} does not match shots {shots}"

dominant_fraction = observed / shots
assert dominant_fraction >= 0.9, f"Expected {expected} to dominate for balanced XOR oracle, got fraction {dominant_fraction:.3f} with counts {counts}"

other_counts = total - observed
assert other_counts <= 0.1 * shots, f"Too much probability outside {expected}: {counts}"
```

```python
expected = "11"
```
```python
dominant = max(counts, key=counts.get)
assert dominant == expected, f"Expected dominant outcome {expected}, got {dominant} with counts={counts}"

expected_count = counts.get(expected, 0)
assert expected_count >= 0.9 * shots, f"Outcome {expected} should dominate for Deutsch-Jozsa balanced oracle, got {expected_count}/{shots}"

other_counts = sum(v for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected)
assert other_counts <= 0.1 * shots, f"Unexpected excess counts on non-signature outcomes: {counts}"
```

```python
expected = "11"
observed = counts.get(expected, 0)
```
```python
total = sum(counts.values())

assert total == shots, f"Total counts {total} do not match shots {shots}"
assert observed / shots > 0.9, f"Expected strong concentration on {expected}, got counts={counts}"
assert all((k == expected) or (v / shots < 0.1) for k, v in counts.items()), f"Unexpected significant outcomes in counts={counts}"
```
